channel.title: GitHub Batchfile Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Batchfile in GitHub

item.title: ionuttbara/windows-defender-remover
item.description: A tool which is uses to remove Windows Defender in Windows 8.x, Windows 10 (every version) and Windows 11.

item.title: AveYo/MediaCreationTool.bat
item.description: Universal MCT wrapper script for all Windows 10/11 versions from 1507 to 21H2!

item.title: enhorse/java-interview
item.description: Вопросы и ответы к интервью Java разработчика
